description: TEMPLATE — copy this shape to record a documented Planet Relationship. Fill source/author/edition/publisher/year/reference/page/quote from a real reference; set status to 'candidate' once proposed and 'verified' (verified=true, confidence raised) only after it has been checked against the source. Never invent references: leave Unknown / null and keep status 'unknown' if you cannot verify. 'relation' must agree with the frozen PlanetRelationshipMatrix (the importer warns on mismatch).
